cleavage agent: digested with trypsin at the Turku Proteomics Facility according to the standard protocol.
enrichment method: using an anti-DICER antibody followed by PCR (ChIP-PCR)
fragmentation method: followed by HCD fragmentation for 10 most intense peptide ions.
instrument: coupled to the Q Exactive mass spectrometer
ionization type: equipped with a nano-electrospray ionization source.
